apps.title: Mafia GO - Dice Master
apps.summary:
Step into the gritty world of mafia crime where power is everything, and only the strongest can survive. Mafia GO! combines the classic gameplay of a board game with intense mafia action. Roll the dice, move across the board, and seize control of territories to build your mafia empire. Every roll brings you closer to domination, but beware — rival gangs are watching your every move, ready to steal what’s rightfully yours!

CLAIM YOUR TERRITORY

Start your journey by rolling the dice and moving across a sprawling city map. Each district holds opportunities for expansion. Conquer areas, take over businesses, and grow your influence. But it’s not just about owning land — it’s about controlling the cash flow and crushing your enemies!

NEW LAW CARDS

Land on the law tile and draw a card with random effects, from earning rewards to penalties. Event-based law cards also mix things up during special periods, keeping the game dynamic and unpredictable.

ATTACK & DEFEND

It’s a dog-eat-dog world out there. Use every trick in the book to raid enemy players, steal their resources, and solidify your place as the top boss. But don’t forget to defend your own turf! Keep an eye out for rivals plotting to overthrow you. Will you strike first or play it safe?

MINI-GAMES FOR BIG WINS

Whether it’s a casino heist or a back alley deal, mini-games are your chance to strike it big. Take risks, make bold moves, and rake in massive rewards. With every victory, you move one step closer to total control of the city.

ESCAPE FROM PD MINI-GAME

Try to escape the police when you land on the station. Roll special dice to get away and earn extra rewards—or face fines if you fail!

UPGRADE YOUR EMPIRE

Roll the dice, earn cash, and invest wisely. Upgrade your businesses, strengthen your mafia family, and become the most feared boss in the city. Every upgrade brings new power and new opportunities.

COLLECTIONS

Unlock and collect cards into sets, trade with others, and earn unique rewards each season. Progress resets with new collections every few months, giving you fresh challenges to complete.

In Mafia GO!, strategy and daring will get you ahead, but only the most ruthless will reign supreme. Can you outsmart your rivals, dominate the board, and become the ruler of the streets? Roll the dice and prove you have what it takes to lead in Mafia GO! Join now and experience the thrill of being a mafia boss!

apps.title: Ever Night: Reawakening
apps.summary:
When the sun's light is swallowed by the abyss, the world falls into eternal night. Demons run wild, civilization nears collapse. In Ever Night, you become the fate-driven LightChaser, embarking on an epic journey across a dark land of despair and miracles. Awaken heroes, form your strongest Party, and uncover the conspiracy behind the Eternal Night to restore the light!

Immersive dark aesthetics, an epic audiovisual feast.
The next-gen engine delivers stunning dark fantasy visuals, complete with intricately detailed environments and dazzling skill effects for a true cinematic experience. Explore mysterious shadowy forests, decaying ancient castles, and deep subterranean abysses as you dive into a breathtaking, immersive storyline.

Massive heroes assemble, strategic combos turn the tide.
Five factions and over a hundred unique heroes await your summon! Warriors, mages, assassins, supporters… freely mix classes and skills. Utilize faction counters and bond bonuses to craft your signature lineup, defeat stronger foes with wit and experience mind-burning strategic gameplay.

Friendly idle play – grow stronger while offline.
No grind, just fun! The smart idle system grants huge rewards even when you're offline. Epic gear and massive resources can be claimed with a single tap upon login, keeping your heroes at peak strength to breeze through every challenge.

Diverse and rich gameplay, explore the endless abyss.
Beyond the gripping main campaign, a variety of modes await your challenge, including Roguelike dungeon exploration, tower trials, world bosses, and more. Every adventure is a fresh experience, with random events and hidden chests keeping the journey full of surprises.

Global server-wide competition, uphold your guild's honor.
Join a guild, forge bonds with trusted allies, and stand together against formidable cross-server invaders. Engage in thrilling arena battles and guild wars, competing against players across the globe. Ascend the leaderboards to claim unparalleled glory and rich rewards!

The light shall never be extinguished, nor hope ever lost. Download Ever Night today and embark on your own journey of redemption!

apps.title: Zomline Survival
apps.summary:
Zomline Survival is a unique zombie strategy game that combines tower-defense combat with production-line management, creating a colorful world where diverse civilizations coexist.

An endless wave of zombies is coming. You must hold the front line while ensuring weapons, arrows, and resources are continuously supplied through efficient production chains.

Build and upgrade defenses, manage supply lines, and respond quickly as enemies grow stronger. Victory depends on clever planning, precise timing, and balanced resource management.

Explore new areas to obtain key resources, recruit heroes from different civilizations, each with unique skills.

With its bright cartoon art style and lighthearted tone, Zomline Survival offers a distinctly fun take on the zombie-apocalypse genre.

apps.title: Among the Sleep
apps.summary:
*TRY FOR FREE*
Among the Sleep is a first-person psychological horror adventure focused on atmosphere, exploration, and immersive storytelling.

After waking in the middle of the night to mysterious sounds, you leave the safety of your bed and begin exploring the darkness in search of comfort. Guided by a worn bear, you navigate a strange and unsettling world where familiar environments feel distorted, unpredictable, and threatening.

Rather than relying on combat or traditional systems, Among the Sleep builds tension through mood, sound, and perspective. Everyday spaces take on new meaning, transforming into something eerie and unknown.

As you progress, the story unfolds through environmental clues and emotional moments, exploring themes of vulnerability, perception, and the fear of the unfamiliar.

Among the Sleep delivers a different kind of horror — one built on tension, atmosphere, and immersion rather than action.

Key Features
- A unique horror perspective
- Experience the world from a vulnerable and disoriented point of view.
- Atmospheric horror without combat
- Focus on exploration, tension, and sound design instead of fighting.
- Surreal and unsettling environments
- Move through dreamlike spaces where reality and imagination blur.
- Emotional, story-driven experience
- Uncover a deeper narrative through environmental storytelling.
- Companion-guided journey

"More, please!" — Kotaku

apps.title: City Car Driving Drift Games
apps.summary:
City Car Driving Drift Games brings you the ultimate urban driving and drifting experience. Get behind the wheel of powerful cars and explore a realistic open city filled with exciting roads, sharp turns, and thrilling challenges. Test your driving skills as you perform smooth drifts, complete missions, and master real car handling physics.
Drive through busy streets, highways, and detailed city environments while enjoying realistic engine sounds and responsive controls. Choose from multiple modern cars, customize your ride, and improve your drifting techniques to become the ultimate drift master. Whether you enjoy free driving or action-packed challenges, this game offers endless entertainment for car lovers.

apps.title: MOTU Skeletor: Until Next Time
apps.summary:
The meme comes to life! Run away as Skeletor in this fast-paced Masters of the Universe endless runner. Swipe, dodge, and turbo-charge through Snake Mountain in a nonstop pursuit across He-Man’s Eternia. Fueled by magic, sorcery, and pure momentum, every run pushes your reflexes further as danger builds and the path ahead grows more intense.

Swipe to Survive: Master smooth swipe controls as you dash forward, leap over traps, and outrun devious obstacles. Each run becomes a rising test of timing, focus, and nerve.

Eternia-Powered Action: Activate powerful abilities, summon Panthor, and unleash villain energy as you push deeper into the chase. The pace builds. The stakes rise. The momentum never breaks.

Heroes, Magic, and Sorcery: From the Man-At-Arms to Evil-Lyn, unlock iconic heroes and devious villains from the world of Masters of the Universe. Each ally and enemy of He-Man brings distinct abilities fueled by magic, sorcery, and power, giving you new ways to dominate every run.

Retro Style, Modern Speed: Inspired by the classic era, the game blends bold retro visuals with fluid modern runner gameplay and collectible items inspired by Masters of the Universe’s treasured history. Snake Mountain, lava caverns, and legendary strongholds come alive in a vibrant, high-energy adventure.

Seasonal Events: Every new season brings unique and exciting gameplay, new things to collect, and more!

Whether you're chasing the next high score with every villain perk or upgrading your Snake Mountain lair, the run keeps calling you back. Run faster. Swipe smarter. Until next time!

⚓ Relax with immersive pirate-themed color by number artwork inspired by treasure maps, hidden islands, legendary ships, lost riches, and unforgettable ocean voyages.
Voyage Color is a relaxing coloring game designed for adults and casual players who love pirate adventures, treasure hunts, maritime exploration, creative art, and immersive coloring experiences. Escape everyday stress and set sail on a journey filled with discovery, freedom, and wonder.

- Stormy seas and epic adventures 🌊
- Sea monsters and maritime myths 🐙

Follow ancient maps, uncover forgotten treasures, explore every island, discover distant shores, and journey across uncharted waters. Every completed coloring artwork brings you one step closer to discovering the secrets hidden beyond the horizon.
🎨 Relaxing Color by Number Gameplay
Voyage Color features:
- Easy tap-to-color controls

Discover the treasure.

apps.title: Revline Online
apps.summary:
Revline Online ( RVO ) is the ultimate mobile driving experience — a massive open-world multiplayer game where you can drift, race, drag race, free roam, and so much more.

★ REAL-TIME MULTIPLAYER ★
Jump into an online world filled with real players. Race head-to-head, cruise together in free roam, compete in drift battles or challenge your friend to a drag race— all in real time.

★ FORM OR JOIN A CREW ★
You can create or join a crew and dominate the streets alongside your crew mates. Every win counts towards your crew's global domination and ranks.

★ MASTER THE DRIFT ★
Chain combos, hold insane angles, and rack up massive drift scores on challenging courses designed for precision and style. Compete against the world via the global leaderboard and reap massive rewards!

★ DRAG RACING ★
Feel the raw power of your cars. Compete in intense drag races. Wager against your friends and earn money!

★ FREE ROAM OPEN WORLD ★
Explore the maps with total freedom. Drive wherever you want and meet other players along the way.

★ CAR CUSTOMIZATION ★
Decals, spoilers, paint, neon lights, tints. Fine-tune performance with engine upgrades, suspension settings, and more.

★ HUGE CAR COLLECTION ★
30+ cars — JDM, European, American muscle, and more. Each with realistic handling, sound and interior

★ MISSIONS & CHALLENGES ★
Complete the daily and weekly challenges to earn rewards and get loads of cash.

★ CONSOLE-QUALITY GRAPHICS ★
Dynamic lighting, realistic reflections, and detailed car models on every device. Its optimised to utilize the power of your phones and make sure it works on as many devices as possible without compromising the quality!

MANY MANY MORE...

Download Revline Online now — Your ride. Your rules. See you on the road, driver 🏁

apps.summary:
Are you looking for a relaxing, anti-stress, and healing casual journey filled with oriental mystery? 🌸
Welcome to Dynasty Match: Brain Puzzle, a highly addictive shape-matching, organizing, and brain-teasing puzzle game! Step into a beautiful ancient world, use your logic and observation skills to restore order to chaos, and experience the ultimate satisfaction for perfectionists.
If you love organization games, ASMR sorting, item matching, spot the difference, and tricky brain puzzles, you will completely fall in love with this unique oriental casual trip!
🧩 HOW TO PLAY:
Observe the empty silhouettes and outlines in each level. Find the perfectly matching ancient artifacts from the scattered items below, and drag them into their exact designated spots. Listen to the crisp ASMR placement sounds and feel the immense healing and satisfaction of tidying up a messy room!
✨ GAME FEATURES:
👑 Royal Organization & Sorting: From the Emperor's messy study room to the Empress's exquisite jewelry box, organize hundreds of stunning antique treasures. Enjoy the satisfying thrill of sorting and putting things in their right place!
🎧 Immersive ASMR Relaxation: Soothing ambient sounds combined with the visual joy of neatness. Say goodbye to anxiety, relieve your daily stress, and relax your mind.
🧠 Fun Brain Training: More than just simple matching! Hidden clues and tricky logic puzzles will test your spatial awareness and observation skills, fully activating your brain.
🎨 Aesthetic Oriental Art: Exquisite hand-drawn 2D graphics blending traditional Asian aesthetics, gorgeous ancient costumes, and classic mythology.
Ready to train your brain, release stress, and satisfy your inner perfectionist? Download Dynasty Match: Brain Puzzle now, become the ultimate royal organizing master, and start your puzzle-solving adventure!

apps.title: Kitchen Ninja — Knife Thrower
apps.summary:
🔪 BECOME THE KITCHEN NINJA

The fruits have gone rogue. The vegetables have staged a rebellion. And it’s your kitchen.

Pick up your blade, take aim, and show every mutinous carrot, furious pepper, and unruly pineapple exactly who runs this place. You’re not just a ninja — you’re the most skillful blade in the culinary world, and these rowdy ingredients are about to find out.

🥕 THE ENEMIES ARE ADORABLE. THEY WON’T STAY THAT WAY.

Our artists went all out. Every enemy is a colorful, expressive, chaotic little troublemaker — from the smug eggplant to the furious tomato to the pineapple boss who really thinks he runs the place. They’re fun to look at. Even more fun to take down.

And when you do — coins. Every strike rewards you. Chain your throws into a streak and your coin haul multiplies. Defeat a boss and earn a big coin bonus. The further you push, the more rewarding it gets.

🎯 MASTER THE BLADE

• Throw with precision — aim is everything

• Chain your strikes and build a streak — coins multiply the longer you last

• Dodge as the enemies fight back — they’re cute but relentless

• Take down epic food bosses — each one drops a serious coin bonus

• Unlock upgrades as you improve — bigger blades, bigger rewards


🔪 ENDLESS KITCHEN MAYHEM

Wave after wave of rebellious produce. Rogue pots. Spinning pans. And the most outrageous food bosses you’ve ever faced. No two runs are the same — but every run leaves you wanting one more.

🌟 WHO’S THE KITCHEN’S BOSS?

Beat your high score. Max out your coin streak. Prove you’re the ultimate Kitchen Ninja — the one who tamed the rebellion and dominated the kitchen.

Free to download. Easy to learn. Impossible to put down.

apps.title: Red Command - War Alert RTS
apps.developer: TINYSOFT - slots, slot machines & casino games
apps.summary:
Alert commander, ww3 just began! Red threat is back! We need your command to conquer the red enemy once again. Show the enemy generals your art of war, command our units and lead us to victory in ww3 in this classic inspired RTS - real time strategy game.
The war has returned. Enemy forces are moving across the battlefield, rival generals are preparing their next strike, and every decision can change the future of the campaign. Take command, upgrade your army, strengthen your generals, and prove that your strategy and art of war can conquer every battlefield.
Red Command - War Alert RTS brings the spirit of classic war strategy into fast tactical battles made for mobile. Build your power, conquer the battlefield, lead your army, unlock new upgrades, and push through a full war campaign where smart decisions matter more than brute force.
BECOME THE COMMANDER
The battlefield needs a leader. As commander, you are responsible for every mission, every upgrade, and every victory. Plan your next move, improve your forces, and use your tactical sense to outplay enemy generals. The red enemy is strong, but a true commander knows how to turn pressure into victory.
UPGRADE POWERFUL GENERALS
Your generals are the key to victory. Upgrade their power, improve their abilities, and prepare them for harder missions. Every stronger general gives you more control over the battlefield and helps you conquer tougher rivals. Choose your upgrades wisely and build an army worthy of command.
CONQUER THE BATTLEFIELD
Every battle is a test of your strategy. Enemy units will try to break your advance, rival commanders will challenge your army, and new missions will demand better planning. Use your resources, improve your units, and conquer each battlefield step by step. Victory belongs to the commander who adapts.
CLASSIC WAR STRATEGY FEEL
Do you miss classic strategy games with soldiers, tanks, generals, upgrades, blue vs. red and large war campaigns? Red Command - War Alert RTS is built for players who love tactical decisions, army progression, battlefield action, and the feeling of commanding a real war machine.
This is a classic inspired strategy experience with modern mobile pacing. Easy to start, satisfying to progress, and challenging enough for players who want to master every mission.
REAL-TIME STRATEGY ACTION
Stay alert, because war does not wait. Battles move quickly, enemy forces react, and your command decisions happen in real time. Improve your army, conquer strong positions, use the right tactics, and push your forces toward victory. Every mission brings action, pressure, and the chance to prove your skill as a commander.
BUILD YOUR WAR MACHINE
A strong army is not created in one battle. Upgrade your units, improve your generals, collect rewards, and unlock more power as the campaign againts red enemy grows. The deeper you go, the stronger the red enemy becomes. Keep improving your strategy and prepare for the next strategy challenge.
FIGHT ENEMY GENERALS
You are not fighting simple soldiers. Enemy generals are leading their own armies and trying to stop your rise. Outsmart them, overpower them, and show them who controls the battlefield. Each victory brings you closer to total domination.
CONQUER THE LEADERBOARD
Conquer rivals and rise through the rankings. Upgrade your generals, complete missions, win battles, and prove that your command belongs among the best. The leaderboard is waiting for commanders who can combine smart strategy with unstoppable ambition.
WHY PLAY RED COMMAND - WAR ALERT RTS?
• Classic inspired war strategy gameplay
• Real-time tactical battles
• Generals to upgrade and command
• Army progression and powerful upgrades
• Soldiers, tanks, and battlefield action
• War campaign full of missions
• Competitive leaderboard progression
• Easy to play, hard to master
• Made for fans of classic RTS and war strategy games

Download now and become the commander your army needs.

apps.title: Game of Thrones: Dragonfire
apps.summary:
Command legendary dragons, forge powerful alliances, and conquer the Seven Kingdoms in the ultimate Game of Thrones strategy game. Build your empire, raise a fearsome dragon army, and wage RTS war across Westeros to claim the Iron Throne. Game of Thrones: Dragonfire is an epic 4X strategy war game where you lead your House through conquest, diplomacy, and dragon warfare in the most immersive medieval fantasy game on mobile.

COLLECT & COMMAND MIGHTY DRAGONS
Hatch, train, and command legendary dragons. Battle with Syrax, Caraxes, Seasmoke, and more. Each dragon possesses unique abilities to turn the tide of tactical warfare. Build an unstoppable dragon army, collect rare species, and evolve them into forces of pure destruction to dominate the skies of Westeros.

WAGE EPIC STRATEGIC WARFARE
Lead your armies in high-stakes PvP war and real time strategy combat. Lay siege to enemy strongholds, defend your castle, and outmaneuver rival Houses in thrilling battles. Whether engaging in PvE campaigns or global clan wars, your mastery of RTS mechanics and cunning strategy will determine who reigns supreme.

BUILD & UPGRADE YOUR KINGDOM
Master base building as you grow a small stronghold into an unassailable fortress. Manage vital resources to fuel your conquest of Westeros and train elite troops in this thrilling battle game. Effective kingdom management and defensive upgrades are the keys to surviving the brutal politics of the Seven Kingdoms.

CONQUER THE SEVEN KINGDOMS
Explore a detailed map of Westeros featuring iconic landmarks like the Red Keep, Dragonstone, and Harrenhal. Expand your empire across legendary regions, conquer rival territories, and control the most powerful strongholds in the realm. In this MMO strategy world, every territory claimed brings you closer to the Iron Throne.

DISCOVER EPIC STORYLINES
Step into the official game of the HBO show House of the Dragon, set 172 years before Daenerys Targaryen. Immerse yourself in a narrative-rich campaign where your decisions shape the destiny of the realm. Interact with iconic characters like Rhaenyra Targaryen and Daemon Targaryen in a story filled with the drama, betrayal, and intrigue that defines Game of Thrones.

FORGE MULTIPLAYER ALLIANCES
Join forces with players worldwide in this massive multiplayer strategy MMO. Coordinate grand strategies with your alliance, dominate the world map, and wage war against rival factions. In a land of shifting loyalties, strong diplomacy and coordinated alliance warfare are essential to securing your legacy.

WHY PLAY GAME OF THRONES: DRAGONFIRE?
• The Definitive GoT Strategy Game: Officially licensed medieval fantasy RPG and war game.
• Deep 4X Gameplay: Explore, expand, exploit and exterminate in a massive world.
• Stunning Visuals: High-fidelity graphics bring the dragons and strongholds of Westeros to life.
• Live Events: Regular updates featuring new dragons, seasonal events, and storylines.
• Global PvP: Compete against thousands of strategists in real-time throne battles.

Download Game of Thrones: Dragonfire now and begin your conquest! The battle for the Seven Kingdoms has begun; Will you command the fire and claim the throne?

apps.title: Kingdom Fall: Zombie Defense
apps.summary:
The kingdom that stood for centuries has fallen within weeks. A mysterious plague swept through the land, turning the dead into mindless monsters that devour everything in their path. Castles lie in ruins, villages are abandoned, and the few survivors who remain have lost all hope. But you refuse to surrender.

As a brave Lord leading a band of desperate survivors, you must rebuild from the ashes, recruit legendary heroes, and defend your stronghold against endless waves of undead that hunger for the living. In this dark age where betrayal and desperation reign, your courage and tactical brilliance will determine whether your people see another sunrise.

Kingdom Fall is a game of valor, strategy, and resilience. Every choice shapes your kingdom's destiny and your legacy as a leader. Will you focus on fortifying your castle walls and training elite defenders, or will you venture into the cursed lands to reclaim lost territories and uncover the source of the plague? The dead are rising, darkness spreads across the realm, and your people look to you for salvation! Do you have what it takes to restore the kingdom's glory?

GAME FEATURES

Rescue and Shelter Survivors: Venture beyond your walls to rescue survivors trapped in overrun villages and abandoned outposts. Bring them to your settlement, where they will pledge their loyalty and help rebuild the fallen kingdom.

Build Your Medieval Stronghold: Construct and upgrade castles, barracks, farms, and defensive structures to create an impregnable fortress. Manage resources wisely and transform your humble refuge into a thriving kingdom.

Recruit Powerful Heroes: Summon valiant knights, cunning rogues, powerful mages, and skilled archers to fight under your banner. Promote and equip them with legendary weapons and armor to lead your armies to victory.

Defend Against the Undead Hordes: Fortify your defenses with towers and elite guards. Command your forces in tactical battles against relentless zombie sieges that grow stronger with each passing night.

Forge Mighty Alliances: Unite with Lords from across the realm to form powerful alliances. Coordinate strategies, share resources, and wage epic wars against rival factions competing for control of the shattered kingdom.

SPECIAL NOTES
· This game includes random-item purchases.
· Network connection is required.
· Privacy Policy: https://www.leyinetwork.com/en/privacy/
· Terms of Use: https://www.leyinetwork.com/en/privacy/terms_of_use

apps.title: Overgeared Hero: Merge RPG
apps.summary:
🎒 Pack your backpack, build your power - Overgeared Hero is the pixel roguelike auto-battler where every item placement decides the fight.

In Overgeared Hero, you collect rare, epic, and legendary gear, merge duplicates into stronger versions, and arrange them in your backpack to unlock powerful synergies. Then your hero auto-battles based on the build you designed. Every run is different, every backpack tells a different story.

💡 Pro tips before you start:
- Item placement is everything. Plan your backpack like a chessboard.
- Train your pets. They pull their weight in every fight.
- Chase the epic and legendary items. Class-specific gear changes everything.

KEY FEATURES

🎒 Merge, Build, Battle
- Merge duplicate items to evolve them into epic-tier gear
- Arrange your backpack to unlock attack and defense synergies
- Combine gear, pets, and class skills into unique combat builds
- Watch your auto-battles play out based on your strategy

⚔️ A Real Pixel Roguelike Auto-Battler
- Procedural roguelike runs with fresh challenges every time
- Auto-battles driven by your backpack design, not luck
- No two runs are the same
- Quick sessions, deep replayability

🧙 Heroes, Pets, and Class Builds
- Pick a class that fits your playstyle
- Train pets that fight alongside you
- Unlock rare and legendary gear as you progress
- Expand your backpack and refine your build

🏆 Compete and Climb
- Test your build against other players in PvP
- Smart backpack design beats raw power, every time
- Climb the leaderboards and prove your strategy

🎨 Retro Pixel Style
- Beautiful retro pixel art with modern combat feel
- Easy to start, deep to master
- Designed for short sessions and long obsessions

If you love merge games, roguelike runs, auto-battlers, or backpack strategy, Overgeared Hero is your next obsession.

Download Overgeared Hero now and start your run!

apps.title: Illusion Connect: Re
apps.summary:
Step back into a world where your adventure once began. Reconnect with the Radiants who fought beside you and relive the excitement of past battles. New encounters, new memories, and new challenges await as your story moves forward.

● Lead Real-time Battles
Take command in dynamic real-time combat where strategy and timing matter. Direct your heroes, shift formations during battle, and combine their strengths to overcome powerful Nightmares.

● Form Your Dream Team
Build your team from a roster of over 130 beautifully illustrated characters, each brought to life with expressive Live2D animation. Every hero offers unique abilities, personalities, and battle roles to discover.

Your adventure grows stronger through the relationships you build. Spend time with your companions and unlock new abilities as your bonds deepen.

apps.title: Solitaire, Classic Card Game
apps.summary:
Enjoy the original Solitaire experience with three popular game modes: Klondike, Spider, and FreeCell. This app provides a clean interface for those who enjoy patience based card puzzles and logic challenges.

Key Features:

apps.title: Tomb Busters
apps.summary:
The first co-op horror extraction game on mobile, with full PC cross-play. Squad up, loot cursed ruins, escape alive — and try not to die laughing.

CO-OP HORROR EXTRACTION — NOW ON MOBILE
The horror extraction genre finally comes to your phone, and it's finally fun for everyone. No hardcore grind. No steep learning curve. Just you, your friends, and a cursed ancient ruin full of things that want to eat you. Drop in with up to 4 players, loot cursed tombs, and extract before ancient horrors end your run. Go deeper for rarer relics, but push too far and you lose everything.

SCARY ALONE. HILARIOUS TOGETHER.
Solo? Genuinely terrifying. With friends? Pure chaos. Play on mobile or PC with full cross-play — your squad, your platform. Proximity voice chat turns every run into unscripted comedy. Dance in front of the boss. Watch your friend's ridiculous death replay on loop. Panic-scream a warning that comes three seconds too late. Oh, and one of your "teammates" might not be human.

20+ MONSTERS FROM FOLKLORE YOU'VE NEVER HEARD OF
Every creature comes from ancient Eastern supernatural legends — each with its own origin story, skill, and weakness. The Ghost Bride hunts only one player — and only that player can see her. The Puppet copies your teammate's voice to lure you in. Fight them, outsmart them — or capture them alive.

PICK YOUR ROLE. OWN YOUR STYLE.
Choose your character — Explorer, Supporter, Fighter — each with a unique playstyle. Then dress them however you want. Tactical gear, elegant maid outfits, wacky headgear so weird even ghosts step aside. Your role, your look.

EVERY RUN HITS DIFFERENT
Randomized maps, traps, loot, and monster spawns. Dynamic conditions shifts mid-raid — blood moons, dense fog, solar eclipses — each changing how monsters behave. No two runs play the same.

apps.title: Ludo Clash - Dice Board Games
apps.summary:
Discover Ludo Clash, a fresh ludo game where every dice roll brings you closer to victory! Move your pieces across the board, knock opponents back to start, and race to bring all your pieces to the finish first. The gameplay feels simple, competitive, and rewarding, combining ludo, parchis, and classic board games rules with challenging thematic levels, bonus tiles, and smart tactical choices.

Looking for a fun board game that is easy to start but keeps every move interesting? This dice game gives you simple rules from the first roll while adding more depth as you progress. If you enjoy board games from ludo and parcheesi to classic dice games, you’ll appreciate how every level brings a new board layout, fresh challenges, and new ways to outplay your opponent. Roll the dice, choose your best move, use special tiles, and turn every race into a fun board game clash!

How to play Ludo Clash:

• Roll the dice and move your pieces across the board.
• Roll a 6 to leave the starting area and enter the race.
• Land on an opponent’s tile to knock their piece back to start.
• Choose which piece to move and plan your route to the finish.
• Use bonus tiles to move forward, move back, teleport, or trigger special effects.
• Unlock unique piece abilities and make your moves even stronger.
• Bring all your pieces to the finish before your opponent to win the level.

If you’re exploring board games for free, or two player games, Ludo Clash adds a fresh level-based twist to classic board game fun!

Why you'll love Ludo Clash:

✔ A fun dice board game with simple rules and exciting competitive gameplay.
✔ Classic parchis and parcheesi-inspired mechanics with a fresh level-based format.
✔ Fast dice rolls, smart moves, and satisfying moments when you knock opponents back.
✔ Bonus tiles that can move pieces forward, send them back, teleport, block, or give extra effects.
✔ Unique piece abilities, including extra life, armor, speed, and sticky movement.
✔ Colorful board game locations, from desert and tropical areas to snowy lands and more.
✔ New level layouts, bonus mechanics, and special tiles that appear as you progress.
✔ Easy to play, but full of tactical decisions that make every dice roll feel important.

Play Ludo Clash and enjoy a fresh ludo adventure across exciting board game levels!

Privacy Policy: https://easybrain.com/policy.html

apps.title: Word Solitaire Go
apps.summary:
Word Solitaire Go is a refined word puzzle that blends the familiar structure of classic solitaire with the challenge of organizing meaning. Instead of numbers and suits, you work with complete word cards and group cards, turning a scattered table into a clear solution through thoughtful play.

How to Play
Every level begins with a partially revealed layout. You first establish the foundation by placing group cards, then draw new word cards into play and commit them to the right sets. Each placement shapes the board, opening some possibilities while quietly limiting others.
With a limited number of moves available, timing matters as much as correctness.

Strategy Over Speed
The challenge in Word Solitaire Go doesn’t come from fast reactions or memorization. It comes from judgment. Should you place a word now, or wait for more information? Should you draw another card, or stabilize what’s already on the table?
One decision can determine how the rest of the round unfolds.

Key Features
Solitaire-inspired gameplay using word and group cards
Meaning-based sorting that rewards logic and insight
A move-limited structure where every placement matters
Gradually evolving difficulty without sudden spikes
Clean, focused presentation designed for calm play

Designed for Thoughtful Players
Each session feels complete on its own, offering a clear beginning, rising tension, and a satisfying resolution. Over time, patterns become clearer, decisions sharper, and progress more rewarding.

Word Solitaire Go is calm on the surface, but deeply engaging once you lean in. It’s a game for players who enjoy focus, structure, and the quiet satisfaction of making everything fit.

Make the perfect seat pick, avoid being outsmarted, and enjoy the steady rhythm of problem-by-problem solving. Whether you’re winding down or chasing that last satisfying solution, this logic grid puzzles game is your go-to mix of comfort and cleverness.

apps.summary:
Drop the Ball. Rack Up Points. Beat Your Rival to 500!

Pachinko is a fast-paced ball-drop strategy game where every decision counts. Send your ball bouncing through a board of pegs and bumpers, then decide: bank your points now or keep dropping to build a bigger score.

HOW TO PLAY
Drop your ball into one of nine scoring bins — worth 20 to 50 points each. Bank what you've earned, or keep dropping to build a bigger pot. But land in the same bin twice and you BUST, losing everything you haven't banked.

STRATEGY MEETS PHYSICS
Each drop plays differently. The physics board randomizes pegs and bumpers every match, so no two games are alike. Read the board, pick your moment to collect, and outplay your rival to 500.

KEY FEATURES
- Classic pachinko action with a strategic twist
- Race to 500 points against a smart AI rival
- Bust mechanic — bold play is rewarded, but timing is everything
- Nudge to push your ball mid-drop when it matters most
- Multiple boards, each with its own visual style and mechanics
- Unlock new boards as you progress
- Fast matches — easy to learn, hard to master

THE NUDGE
One free Nudge per match lets you apply a powerful sideways force to your ball mid-drop — steer it away from a Skull bin or aim for a big score. Need more? Extra Nudges are there when the stakes are high.

BOARDS
Play across beautifully crafted pachinko boards, each with a unique look and feel. Boards unlock as you play, and some feature special mechanics that add new twists to every match.

Can you reach 500 before your rival does? Download now and find out!

apps.title: Sword x Staff
apps.summary:
Sword x Staff is a one-of-a-kind RPG — a “Third Way RPG.”
Strategy, massive world exploration, idle—why pick one when you can have it all?
Go hardcore, or just vibe—either way, you’ll find your own kind of fun here. The kind that actually feels different.
No pressure, no one way to play—just jump in, explore, and let the adventure click your way.
Curious what the gameplay is really like?
So, welcome to the unique world of Kanstein, and experience the one-of-a-kind Third Way adventure. Here, you are the Chosen Adventurer transported to this isekai! Team up with the Staff and Sword Twins and dive into a quest to save the world. Pierce through thick fog, dig up forgotten treasures, and explore a huge interactive world at your own pace. Mix and match over 200 skills to create a fighting style that’s uniquely yours. Best of all, you’ll meet amazing allies to fight by your side against legendary Hieromons! Of course—Remember, all of this can be enjoyed completely pressure-free, since the idle gameplay making resource gathering a breeze！
[Idle Game, but with a massive interactive world]
Most idle games have you waiting. Sword x Staff lets you actually go somewhere.
Step into a huge world map where every region has its own vibe and secrets to uncover. Roam the lush wilds of Verdantglade, face the clash of steel and instinct in Cinder Ridge, drift through the mist-shrouded waters of Aqualis, and uncover the ancient bronze ruins hidden within Loong Haven.
Every region brings new sights, companions, treasures, and those "just one more look" moments. And even when you're offline, your adventure doesn't stop. Resources keep piling up while you rest, and the Traveling Merchant shows up with rare goods while you're away. Log back in, cash out, and keep going.
[Deep strategy, but easy to jump in]
Strategy is fun because of freedom, not because it needs a spreadsheet.
Everything starts with the classic Warrior & Mage dual-class system, branching into 200+ skill combinations and playstyles. Mix skills, change cast order, swap elemental builds, and fine-tune your setup however you like.
No fixed meta. No single "right" answer. Just true variety and real flexibility, and plenty of room to experiment.
Keep it casual, or go full theorycraft mode. How deep you go is completely up to you.
[Progress Without the Grind]
Power up without the endless farming. Even while you're offline, resources stack up, characters grow stronger, and progression keeps moving.
Lie back, rest up, and wake up stronger! Watch clouds drift across the Floating Islands, stargaze from your cozy cabin, hunt for hidden treasure, or level up while doing absolutely nothing heroic for a minute.
Easy progress, low stress, steady rewards—that's what we call relaxed, efficient progression
[Auto-Battles Are Easy, But Never Boring]
Tired of idle games where heroes just stand still? Here, AI-driven characters adapt to the battlefield—repositioning, predicting enemies, chasing targets, and unleashing ultimate skills. Auto-battles aren’t boring—they’re tactical, flashy, and full of epic combos.
[Unique avatars, without looking the same]
Your avatar is yours, full stop. Go bold with wild hairstyles, unusual features, standout looks, or choices that are a little chaotic in the best way. Make something cool, weird, stylish, hilarious—or all four at once! No "same face, different outfit." Make it 100% original. Walk into town and stand out. In Kanstein, being unforgettable is part of the fun.

apps.title: Soul Land: Awakening World
apps.summary:
Dual-authorized by the original anime and novel, the first-ever 3D Open-World MMORPG of the "Soul Land" IP is now available across all platforms! It's time to reshape the massive world of Soul Land and redefine the absolute pinnacle of IP quality!

The moment of awakening has arrived. Welcome to Soul Land: Awakening World! From the instant the first spark of Soul Power stirs within you, your destiny is set: to stand at the heart of the storm and become the legend itself.

The old laws have crumbled, and a tide of new power is rising. From tranquil forests to hidden lakes, every unique Spirit and Spirimon awaits. Meet the legendary Seven Monsters and the formidable Spirit Temple Elders—their stories are yours to discover. Now, it is time to carve your name into your own divine epic.

Redefine the Soul Land Universe!

Beyond Boundaries: Explore the Breathtaking Realm of Soul Land

From the humble fields of Saint Village to the eternal frost of the Icebound Forest; from the untamed wilds of Aster Forest to the crashing tides of Isle of Poseidon—the world is yours to command. Every corner holds a secret. Scout for hidden treasures, delve into ancient caves to hunt Spirimon, or challenge the Spirimasters at Spirit Temple. In this boundless world, your journey has no limits!
Shatter the Chains: Master the Art of Limitless Combat

Experience a faithful recreation of the original Soul Land combat system, featuring non-targeted mechanics, precise dodges, aerial maneuvers, and fluid skill execution. Seamlessly switch between Spirits, customize your tactical loadouts, and exploit attribute advantages to suppress your foes. Transform every encounter into a masterclass of skill and strategy. Experience the true rush of high-octane battle and the unique charm of Spirimaster duels!
Hunt Unbound: Carve Your Legend as the Strongest Spirimaster

Warning! Spirimon spotted ahead! Prepare for an authentic hunting odyssey as you face off against formidable creatures in thrilling, high-stakes showdowns. Defeat these Spirimon to absorb Halos and Spiribones, unlocking a vast array of powers. Ascend to godhood with ease!
Supreme Quality: Immerse Yourself in a Flawless Anime Recreation

Experience the definitive Soul Land journey, authentically adapted from the original novels and animation. With breathtaking, high-fidelity visuals and a narrative faithful to the source, your "Road to Douluo" begins now. Relive the most iconic memories of Tang San and Xiao Wu, grow alongside them, and uncover brand-new chapters on your path to divinity.

Join us now and embark on an epic Soul Land adventure fueled by passion and glory!

apps.title: OTR 2
apps.summary:
The legendary extreme off-road simulator returns with its most ambitious world yet! Off the Road 2 redefines freedom, putting you behind the wheel of the world’s most powerful machines. Explore a massive, seamless map 30 times larger than the original, filled with hills to climb, infinite roads, highways, off-road trails, untamed wilderness, and hidden secrets.

PLAY ANYWHERE
OTR2 is fully playable Offline

UNRIVALED VARIETY
Why settle for just trucks? Master the terrain in rugged 4x4s, tear up the asphalt in supercars, take to the skies in fighter jets, or dominate the waves in high-speed powerboats.

NEXT-GEN PHYSICS & GRAPHICS
Experience one of the most realistic vehicle simulator mechanics on mobile. Watch realistic mud stick to your tires, and feel the impact with our advanced vehicle damage system. Our state-of-the-art engine delivers console-quality lighting and breathtaking water physics.

LIMITLESS CUSTOMIZATION
Make every ride your own with the all-new Livery Editor. From paint jobs and decals to performance tuning, the only limit is your imagination.

EXPLORE TOGETHER
The world is better with friends. Join the online multiplayer with up to 6 players to compete in high-stakes races, or just cruise the vast open world in real-time with friends across the globe.

GAME FEATURES:
-Massive Open World: Explore mountains, deserts, and oceans, drive at top speed in highways!
-Multi-Vehicle Support: Trucks, super sports cars, helicopters, planes, and boats.
-Realtime Day & Night cycle: Adapt to changing conditions and day/night cycles.
-Realistic Simulation: Fully modeled interiors and functional vehicle parts.
-Missions System: Earn rewards by completing deliveries and more.

apps.title: Bubble Match - Connect Puzzle
apps.summary:
Bubble Match is a fun and clever connect puzzle game where you group cute bubble characters by hidden associations.

Each level shows a board full of unique characters. Your goal is to observe the bubbles, find what connects them, and sort them into the correct categories. Some characters may share outfits, emotions, colors, styles, jobs, or surprising visual clues.

All innovative trendy puzzle game! Bubble Match is a logic puzzle built around observation, matching, sorting, and association.

Features:

• Connect cute bubble characters
• Find hidden categories and shared traits
• Train your brain with logic puzzles
• Improve your observation skills
• Enjoy hundreds of unique levels
• Simple tap controls and relaxing gameplay
• A fresh visual twist on category and association puzzles

If you enjoy connect puzzle games, match puzzle games, brain puzzles, sorting games, category puzzles, or visual logic challenges, Bubble Match gives you a new way to play.

Look carefully. Think smart. Match the right bubbles and clear every level.

>>Hero Transformation, MVP Monsters Evolve, Awakened Heroes Surge with Power
>>Adventure Team, Fight Side by Side with Friends, Double the Fun in Team Battles

Ragnarok: Twilight Global is a brand-new MMORPG in the Ragnarok IP series. As the first RO mobile game featuring “100% Drop Rate” + “Hero Transformation”, it perfectly blends classic RO elements with innovative gameplay. The game not only brings back iconic elements such as nostalgic BGM, adorable pets like Poring and Raging Lunatic, classic MVP monsters like Baphomet and Phreeoni, and a versatile fashion system, but also faithfully recreates the complete job changing system from Novice to Swordsman, Acolyte, Mage, Thief, and Archer.
This time, in-game rewards have been greatly increased. Defeating MVPs guarantees a 100% gear drop, and players can grow stronger easily even through idle gameplay. The debut Hero Transformation System allows players to transform into legendary MVP/BOSS heroes such as Baphomet, while the Adventure Team Mode lets you experience the social fun of exploring dungeons and defeating bosses with friends.

【Classic IP, A Brand-New Journey】
A perfect fusion of RO classic elements and innovative gameplay! As the familiar BGM begins to play, memories instantly come flooding back. The adorable mount Poring mount and pet Raging Lunatic return to accompany your journey! Classic MVP monsters like Baphomet and Phreeoni are waiting for your challenge.
【100% Drop Rate, Grow Strong While You Relax】
The most generous RO is here! No need to purchase equipment. You can defeat MVPs for 100% epic gear drops! Strengthen effortlessly through idle gameplay, with 20 hours of offline auto-battling. Log back in to claim massive EXP, epic gear, and cards, and reach Level 150 in just one hour! There are also Exclusive MVP Dungeons with no monster competition. Solo players can freely farm bosses and grow rapidly without pressure.
【Hero Transformation, MVP Evolution】
MVP monsters undergo ultimate evolution and appear as powerful heroes, allowing you to break through combat limits and transform into mighty bosses within the game!
When Angeling evolves into the Blazing Angel, and Deviling awakens its dark power to become the Demon Enchantress, the once-familiar MVP monsters transcend dimensions and evolve into heroes with mythic power.
【Adventure Team, Double the Fun】
Say goodbye to solo adventures and enjoy relaxed social gameplay! Team up with friends to form an Adventure Team, clear main story missions and dungeons together, and participate in guild wars to seize the throne of the royal castle. No need to worry about insufficient combat power --get carried anytime! The special Couple System even allows you to deepen bonds while adventuring together, fulfilling both friendship and romance.
【Unique Costumes, Style Your Way】
With 1000+ OOTD combos, express your style freely! Create your exclusive look with DIY outfits, switching effortlessly from cute styles to cool aesthetics. Dynamic wings, headgear costumes, chat expressions, and many other cosmetic options are available, allowing you to begin a brand-new adventure in style as a Novice.

For more updates and gameplay reveals, please stay tuned to the official Ragnarok: Twilight Global Facebook page.

apps.title: Pictonico!
apps.summary:
Turn your photos into minigames!
Sure, it's kind of silly... But there's no telling what will happen next!

・ Here come your school's sports stars...strutting down the red carpet!
・ Your boss is hungry and needs your help!
・ Try to wash away those embarrassing high-school memories.
・ Son won't quiet down? Zip his mouth!
・ Two old friends reconnect while skydiving!
・ Grandpa dressed like a ballerina? Can't miss this photo op.
・ Mom's angry... But that nose hair must be plucked!
・ Dad's making that face again. Wait, is that a facial mask?
・ Best friend turned final boss?! Evasive maneuvers!
・ That calm, collected teacher was all muscle this whole time?

You can try a few minigames for free, or purchase volumes to unlock up to 80 minigames in total, ranging from easy to pretty tricky.
Get ready to laugh out loud when you look back at old photos!

You can even take photos with friends on the spot and use them right away.

*This game is free-to-start.
*Purchase of a game volume is required for gameplay, but you can play a demo of some minigames for free.
*A constant online connection is not required, but temporary network access may be needed for the following operations, which may incur data charges:
・ First launch
・ Purchasing game volumes
*Your photos are not sent to Nintendo.

apps.title: Vita Mahjong Wood
apps.summary:
Vita Mahjong Wood: Classic Wooden Tile Matching, Your Exclusive Relaxing Puzzle Game!
Vita Mahjong Wood is an exclusive classic wooden tile matching puzzle game. We are thrilled to present this mahjong game that combines innovation with classic gameplay. It features warm, wooden large tiles and a user-friendly interface compatible with pads and phones. Our goal is to provide a relaxing yet mentally engaging gaming experience, particularly focused on older adults.
How to Play Vita Mahjong Wood:
Playing the free Vita Mahjong Wood game is simple. Just aim to clear all the tiles on the board by matching tiles with identical images. Tap or slide two matching wooden tiles, and they will vanish from the board. Your objective is to match tiles that are not concealed or blocked. Once all tiles are eliminated, it signifies successful completion of a mahjong game!
Exclusive Vita Mahjong Wood Game Features:
- Classic Wooden Mahjong Experience: Staying true to the original gameplay, it presents traditional wood-grained tile sets and hundreds of boards, offering you the purest classic feel.
- Special Innovations: Besides the classic, our game introduces special tiles that add a fresh twist to traditional mahjong.
- Large-Scale Design: Our mahjong games feature large, easily readable text sizes on comfortable wooden tile surfaces to alleviate the strain caused by small fonts.
- Active Mind Levels: A special mode designed to sharpen your mind and improve memory abilities in the mahjong games.
- Customizable Scoring: You can enjoy free classic mahjong games without a timer and any score pressure.
- Super Combo: When you consecutively match mahjong tiles during the game, you will unlock special experiences.
- Helpful Hints: Our game provides free useful props, such as hints, undo, and shuffle, to help players overcome challenging puzzles.
- Daily Challenge: Take on daily practice to collect trophies and improve your classic mahjong solitaire game skills.

apps.title: Word Solitaire
apps.summary:
Word Solitaire is a clever blend of card strategy and word discovery. It's not your usual word game — here, you'll match ideas, uncover connections, and build meaning chains to clear the board. Relax, think, and play your way through hundreds of challenging levels that twist the classic solitaire formula into something totally fresh.

A New Kind of Word Challenge
What happens when solitaire meets the art of finding hidden connections?
Each level starts with a few cards on the table and a full deck waiting to be revealed.
Draw cards one by one, find the right categories, and place matching words in their proper spots. Just like solitaire, smart planning matters — one misplaced card can change everything.

How to Play:
- Tap to draw cards from the deck.
- Place category cards first to create a foundation.
- Add all related word cards to complete the group.
- Clear all stacks to win the level.

It's simple to learn but deeply satisfying to master.

Why You'll Enjoy It:
- A relaxing mix of solitaire logic and word connection puzzles
- Hundreds of handcrafted levels full of clever links and surprises
- No timers, no rush — play at your own pace
- Smooth design and rewarding progression
- Ideal for fans of word, logic, and card games

Play in Your Language
Word Solitaire is now available in multiple languages — switch the game to the one that feels most natural to you:
🇫🇷 French · 🇩🇪 German · 🇪🇸 Spanish · 🇷🇺 Russian · 🇵🇹 Portuguese · 🇹🇷 Turkish · 🇯🇵 Japanese · 🇰🇷 Korean
One game, endless languages — for players all around the world.

Train Your Brain, One Word at a Time
Every match you make sharpens your reasoning and vocabulary. Think outside the box, spot the hidden connection, and feel that "aha" moment with every correct pairing.

What Players Are Saying
"Brilliant combination of cards and words. Totally addictive."
"Perfect balance of thinking and relaxing — my new favorite puzzle."
"So satisfying when you find the hidden link."

Whether you love word games, card games, or brain teasers, Word Solitaire delivers the best of all worlds. It's clever, calm, and endlessly replayable.

apps.title: Racing Master
apps.summary:
Racing Master is a high-quality racing game developed in collaboration with CODEMASTERS®. It features over 100 officially licensed iconic vehicles that players can customize, allowing them to compete in thrilling races set in cities and renowned circuits around the world. With realistic visuals and engine sounds, you can experience an immersive atmosphere that feels just like the real thing, while also enjoying fierce real-time competition with other players.

——————————————
Key Features of Racing Master
1. Authentic Vehicles
Racing Master boasts over 120 officially licensed vehicles from more than 30 prestigious brands. Each car is intricately modeled using advanced real-time lighting technology, ensuring every detail shines. Get behind the wheel of legendary machines like the Lamborghini Aventador SVJ (LB834) '19 and ignite your passion for racing!
2. Deep Customization
Make your vehicles truly yours with a myriad of customization options, including colors, liveries, decals, tires, rims, suspension settings, brakes, and authentic aftermarket parts.
3. Global Tracks
Experience the thrill of racing on real-world scanned tracks and circuits, featuring iconic locations such as Chicago, San Francisco, Barcelona, Sicily, Amsterdam, and the Alps. You'll also race on famous real-world F1 circuits, including Shanghai International Circuit, Indianapolis, and Red Bull Ring! Each track presents unique driving challenges.
4. Competitive Racing
Our advanced physics engine accurately simulates various drive systems and low-speed ignition characteristics. Compete in exhilarating PvP matches, GvG battles, and intense racing tournaments.
5. Immersive Audio
Feel the rush with meticulously recorded vehicle sounds that capture the distinct nuances of engine notes, exhaust systems, transmissions, suspensions, and aerodynamics.

——————————————
For more information about Racing Master, visit:
· Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/Racingmasterofficial
· Discord: https://discord.gg/9SbzjsxFVb

apps.title: Police Chief
apps.summary:
The world is shrouded in crime. Cities teem with gangs, drug cartels, and assassin syndicates — citizens live in fear. As the newly appointed police chief, you must start small and strategically expand a local precinct while safeguarding the city. Grow your reputation step by step: expand office space, establish new departments, streamline paperwork, recruit elite officers, and equip your team with top-tier gear to tackle increasingly complex cases. Transform a modest station into a prestigious law enforcement headquarters!

1. Design & Build Your Police HQ
Build an empire of justice from the ground up! Freely arrange facilities such as interrogation rooms, holding cells, and armories to optimize investigations. Every brick you lay brings the city closer to order.

2. Recruit Officers & Upgrade Gear
Assemble a dream team of elite officers to dismantle criminal schemes. Invest resources in advanced weaponry and vehicles to handle escalating threats.

3. Investigate Cases Strategically
Intimidation or incentives? Choose interrogation strategies and adapt your approach to each suspect. As your caseload grows, you’ll face off against notorious criminals and deploy SWAT teams to bring them to justice!

4. Manage Inmates
More inmates mean more federal funding, but they also require meticulous oversight. Classify inmates by risk level, assign them to segregated housing, and maintain vigilant patrols to prevent jailbreaks.

5. Crush Prison Riots
Poor meals, cramped cells, or lax surveillance can spark violent uprisings. Mobilize rapid-response teams in riot gear to suppress them before they tank your reputation and funding!

Key Features:

Strategic Depth: Balance budget, reputation, and security in a dynamic crime ecosystem.
Progression System: Evolve from a rundown precinct to a high-tech law enforcement center.
Realistic Challenges: Adapt to gang wars, hostage crises, and corruption scandals.
Can you bring the streets back from the brink? The city’s fate rests in your hands.

apps.title: Piano Tap: Rush Song Game
apps.developer: NekoBeat Studio: Cozy Cats & Cute Music Games
apps.summary:
Piano Tap: Rush Song Game – The Ultimate Anime Music Game! 🎵⚡

Dive into Piano Tap: Rush Song Game, the most electrifying anime music game on mobile. Featuring stunning anime girl art, addictive rhythm gameplay, and a fire lineup of Phonk, K-Pop, EDM, and TikTok songs — Piano Tap is the anime game built for players who feel music in their soul.

Tap the Beat. Feel the Rush.
Piano Tap is a rhythm game like no other. Tap falling tiles in sync with explosive song beats — miss one, the music dies. Nail every note and watch your anime girl react, the screen igniting with neon energy. This fast, satisfying mechanic makes Piano Tap one of the most addictive anime rhythm games available. It's not just a tap game — it's a rush.

Phonk. K-Pop. EDM. TikTok. This Is Your Sound.
Piano Tap: Rush Song Game is built around the music genres you actually love. Our growing library spans:

🎵 Phonk songs — drift-era bangers and dark melodic phonk hits
🎵 K-Pop songs — chart-topping idol tracks and viral K-Pop anthems
🎵 EDM songs — festival drops and high-energy electronic beats
🎵 TikTok songs — the viral hits blowing up your For You Page right now

New songs added constantly. Piano Tap stays fresh so your anime music game experience never gets stale.

Why Piano Tap: Rush Song Game Is the Anime Game You Need:

Anime Theme, Anime Girls, Real Energy: Piano Tap isn't just a tap game — it's a full anime game experience. Beautiful anime girl characters react to your performance, bringing the music to life with expressive animations. Whether you're clearing a Phonk rush or a K-Pop ballad, your anime girl celebrates every perfect tap.
Massive Song Library: Hundreds of songs across Phonk, K-Pop, EDM, and TikTok song categories — and growing fast. This anime music game has a track for every mood.
Multiple Difficulty Levels: Casual tap game fan or rhythm game veteran? Piano Tap scales with you. Cruise through beginner song tiles or push your reflexes on the fastest Phonk and EDM tracks. True mastery takes time — this anime game rewards it.
Anime Rush Battle Mode: Go head-to-head in real-time Anime Rush Battle Mode. Challenge global players in this anime game's live multiplayer arena. Your phonk skills vs. theirs — prove who's the real rhythm game champion.
Offline Mode — Play Anywhere: No signal? Piano Tap's Offline Mode keeps the anime music game going. Practice Phonk runs, grind K-Pop scores, and perfect TikTok song tiles on commutes, planes, or anywhere. The rush never stops.
Free to Play Anime Game: Piano Tap: Rush Song Game is free to download and play. Jump straight into the anime music game experience — access songs, anime girl characters, and core rhythm game features at zero cost. (Optional in-app purchases available.)
Unlock Anime Girls & Rewards: Every tap game session earns progress. Unlock new anime girl characters, exclusive Phonk and K-Pop song packs, and limited anime game cosmetics. Your dedication builds your roster.
Stunning Anime Visuals: Neon palettes, fluid anime girl animations, and a visual style built for EDM and Phonk energy. Piano Tap is the most visually distinctive anime music game in the rhythm game category.

apps.title: Quiz Blitz: Test Brain Game
apps.developer: Quiz & Trivia Games by Mno Go Apps
apps.summary:
Welcome to Quiz Blitz - A Puzzle & Trivia Challenge for Curious Minds

Dive into Quiz Blitz, a one-of-a-kind puzzle quiz game where every question is a chance to unlock brain-teasing challenges, discover amazing facts, and train your logic skills through smart, interactive gameplay.

Quiz Blitz offers a fresh, puzzle-first take on traditional trivia games. Explore a wide range of topics - like music, animals, geography, science, art, and pop culture - brought to life through image-based puzzles, logic riddles, and satisfying “aha!” moments. This isn’t just another trivia app. It’s a puzzle journey, a brain training experience, and an IQ challenge designed for thinkers and explorers.

What Makes Quiz Blitz a Great Puzzle Game?

- Visual logic puzzles: Identify icons, objects, faces, animals, and places using visual clues

- Interactive gameplay: Swipe, tap, drag, and solve challenging logic-based quiz tasks

- Topic-based puzzle levels: Unlock themed packs—music, geography, science, art and more

- Flexible difficulty: Choose your pace—relax with casual play or complete 100% for a challenge

- Brain-friendly design: Ideal for adults, families, and curious puzzle lovers of all ages

- Smart progression: Earn stars, unlock achievements, and grow your puzzle-solving skills

Built for Puzzle & Trivia Fans Who Want More!

If you enjoy puzzle games, visual riddles, logic challenges, or trivia apps that engage your brain, Quiz Blitz is made for you. It blends thoughtful design with rewarding gameplay, offering a clean and fun experience you can enjoy anytime. Whether you're a trivia buff, a puzzle pro, or just love solving things, there’s always something new to discover.

Your next puzzle journey is just a tap away.

Challenge your brain. Solve with style. Welcome to Quiz Blitz.

• Select from distinctive classes like the Warrior, Rogue, Sorcerer, Necromancer, Swashbuckler, and Valkyrie — each with a unique feel and powerful abilities.
• Experiment with a multi-class system allowing you blend abilities from different achetypes and create a truly unique warrior.
• Explore the different skill trees to unlock powerful synergies and legendary skills, making every playthrough unique.

The world is filled with hidden discoveries waiting to be found:
• Pull the legendary Sword in the Stone, unlock sliding bookcases, and walk the Path of Fire.
• Solve the Weeping Angel puzzle, discover what waits for you beyond the Looking Glass.
• Find the Veiled Temples, Pirate Caves, and the horrors of the Baron's Laboratory.
• Track your progress - the map shows how many secrets remain in each area.

DARK AND WHIMSICAL WORLD
Encounter a world of contrasts, where light and darkness dance:
• Explore haunted graveyards, abandoned churches, eerie swamps, mysterious lagoons, treacherous pirate caves, and ancient mines.
• Face the darkness: battle skeletal hordes, giant spiders, oozing slimes, fire elementals, spectral wraiths, and carnivorous plants.
• Confront epic bosses like the Brood Mother, Lich Lord, Pirate Captain, and the mysterious Baron von Darkwood.
• Discover serene moments with unicorns in sunlit glades and mermaids offering riddles by moonlit waterfalls.

ARCADE-INSPIRED COMBAT
Feel the thrill of smooth, responsive controls that adapt to your style:
• Choose between arcade and dual-stick control options for a flexible experience that feels great in your hands.
• Engage in satisfying, responsive combat that makes every fight feel impactful, like an arcade brawler in a fantasy world.
• Hire mercenaries to fight alongside you, raise the dead as a Necromancer, or ride into battle on horseback.

ENDLESS REPLAYABILITY
Your journey doesn't end at victory:
• Unlock heirlooms and a retirement system, encouraging fresh playthroughs and new challenges.
• Choose from many side quests: Solve mermaid riddles, explore the Sunken Citadel, and piece together the secrets of the mysterious Esmeralda
• Power up with new gear, refined strategies, and complete achievements

READY FOR ANY PLAYTIME
Quick missions that deliver big on action:
• 3-4 minute loops offer bite-sized, high-energy action perfect for mobile.
• Each mission drops you instantly into the heart of the action, keeping every session short and intense.

Embrace the whimsy and darkness of Shadowborn — an arcade RPG crafted for mobile players who crave fast-paced action in a world as enchanting as it is deadly. Download now and begin your journey!

apps.title: Rap Star:Idle Clicker
apps.summary:
From streets to stardom — tap, rap, earn, date, collect. Rap Star: Idle Clicker is a rap life simulator meets idle tycoon. Start with $1 and build your rap empire. Every tap rewrites your destiny.
TAP TO RAP, STACK CASH
Every tap is money. From freestyling on corners to sold-out stadiums, your rap career starts from zero. Invest in studios, unlock new flows, hire producers. Even offline, your hustle never stops.
FROM BROKE TO BILLIONAIRE
A busted car with no AC and one dollar. That's all you start with. But the finish line is a penthouse, a private jet, and an island with your name on it. Upgrade your crib, car, clothes, studio — watch your world transform from ruins to empire. Not a fairy tale. A real, brick-by-brick come-up.
BUILD YOUR MUSIC EMPIRE
More than making songs — build an empire. Own a record label, launch fashion lines, sign rising stars. Drop singles that break the internet, top the charts, become a cultural icon. Every choice shapes your legend.
MINI-GAMES THAT KEEP YOU HOOKED
Your rap career isn't just tapping — addictive mini-games pop up throughout your rise. The faster your fingers, the faster your fame.
ROMANCE — STARS ARE NEVER ALONE
When you reach the top, the women follow. They're not accessories — each one has her own story, her own temper, her own world.
Take her somewhere romantic and watch her melt. Take her somewhere ridiculous and watch her flip. Give her a cheap little gift to make her smile, or drop serious cash on luxury and watch her scream. Get to know her past and enter her heart, or keep your distance and enjoy the tension.
Every woman treats you differently. Every relationship goes where you take it. Loyal or player? Deep love or just a fling? This is your life. Nobody chooses for you.
COLLECT — DEFINE YOUR IDENTITY THROUGH TASTE
Every rap legend has a collection. Kicks, vinyl, skateboards, diamond grillz — these aren't just items. They're symbols of rap culture. Symbols of who you are.
Open the vault. Pull legendary pieces. Every item makes you stronger, and completing certain combos unlocks hidden stories — about the deepest secrets in the industry.
Your collection isn't just trophies in a display case. It's proof of the roads you've walked, the money you've earned, the life you've lived.
IMMERSIVE STORY
Comic-style dialogue with branching choices that affect the outcome. Every decision changes your path, your reputation, and your ending.
PK BATTLES
PK battles in your hood. Upgrade faster to win. Defend your block. Earn respect.
FEATURES
• Idle clicker core — Tap to earn. Offline earnings never stop.
• Life simulation — Relationships, reputation, fame. Experience the ups and downs.
• Full come-up — From $1 to billionaire. Upgrade everything.
• Multiple unique girlfriends — Every relationship has depth. Every woman has attitude.
• Legendary collectibles — Totems of rap culture. Proof of your taste and identity.
• Music tycoon — Studios, labels, business empire.
• Addictive mini-games — Tap challenges for bonus rewards.
• Go viral — Top charts. Become an icon.
• Immersive story — Branching choices change your fate.
• PK battles — Compete with rivals. Win respect.
• Hip hop culture — From underground to stadiums.
• Endless upgrades — Cribs, cars, clothes, studios. Everything levels up.
YOUR LEGEND STARTS NOW
No handouts. No shortcuts. Just a mic and a dream. Pick it up. The world is waiting.

apps.title: Imposter : Word Party Game
apps.summary:
Imposter – Offline Party Game | Social Deduction & Bluff Game
Who is the imposter? Can you lie your way to victory or expose the truth?
Imposter is a fast-paced offline party game for friends, families, and groups who love social deduction games, bluffing, and hilarious debates. Perfect for game nights, travel, classrooms, and parties — no internet required!

How to Play
Imposter Mode
Each player receives a secret word.


One player gets only “IMPOSTER.”


Everyone gives a one-sentence clue.


The imposter tries to guess the word.


The group debates and votes to expose the liar.


New Mode: Find the Liar
All players receive the same question.


One player secretly gets a different question.


Listen carefully, debate, and vote for the liar!



Why Players Love Imposter
Offline party game – play anywhere, no Wi-Fi needed
3+ players – perfect group & family game
Quick rounds – ideal for short sessions and replayability
Easy to learn – start playing in seconds
Bluff, strategy & social deduction combined
Great for game nights, travel, school, and icebreakers

Perfect For Fans Of
Social deduction games


Party games with friends


Bluffing & deception games


Word guessing games


Icebreaker games for groups


If you enjoy games like social deduction party hits, you’ll love Imposter.

Key Features
🎭 Social deduction & bluff gameplay


🧠 Improve communication and critical thinking


👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 Family-friendly group game


📱 Offline mobile game


🎉 Endless fun with multiple categories & difficulty levels


The Ultimate Icebreaker Game
Whether you’re at a party, on a road trip, or in a classroom, Imposter creates unforgettable moments full of laughter, suspicion, and clever lies.

apps.title: Arrow Maze-Tap Away
apps.summary:
Welcome to Arrow Maze-Tap Away : Logic's Solution Domain, a minimalist puzzle game that tests your planning and foresight. Your goal is simple and clear: safely extract all the arrows. However, every move must be precise, or the entire board will be thrown into chaos.
Core Features:
Step-by-Step Logical Challenges: Every move is crucial. You'll need to anticipate the paths of all the arrows, carefully plan their extraction order, and find the one and only path to order amidst the chaos.

Massive Handcrafted Puzzles: The game features thousands of levels meticulously polished by designers. With a smooth, progressive difficulty curve—from introductory guides to mind-bending challenges—it will challenge your intellectual limits step by step.

Minimalist Vision, Ultimate Focus: Free from all distractions, the clean and restrained visual style allows you to immerse yourself completely in the world of thought, focusing on the structure and logic of the puzzle itself.
A Stress-Free Space for Contemplation: No time limits, no score penalties. You can pause at any time to rehearse different strategies and enjoy the pure joy of solving complex problems at a relaxed pace.
Thoughtful Hint System: When your thoughts hit a dead end, the built-in hint system will light a lamp for you, providing just the right amount of guidance to help you break through bottlenecks.
Are you ready? Within the confines of the grid, use your wisdom to carve a path of escape for all the arrows—free from conflict.

Your adventure begins with a lone hunter armed with only a weak spear. Each successful hunt rewards you with coins and diamonds that can be used to strengthen your tribe. Upgrade your spear damage and increase the number of spears you throw to hunt more efficiently.

Take on increasingly difficult hunts and battle enormous enemies inspired by prehistoric creatures. Step by step, you will move closer to the ultimate goal: defeating the giant mammoth.

MammothHunters combines the thrill of precise aiming with a simple and satisfying progression system. Perfect for players who enjoy casual hunting games, upgrade systems, and fast-paced action.

apps.title: Meowdoku: Brain Puzzle Games
apps.summary:
Looking for a game that soothes the soul but keeps your brain spinning? Welcome to Meowdoku — a pure logic puzzle game that flawlessly blends the rigorous reasoning of Sudoku with the thrilling deduction of Minesweeper.
Here, you have only one mission: find the perfect "exclusive territory" for every aloof little cat!
💡 Simple Rules, Deep Strategy
The concept is elegant and intuitive, yet anything but simple:
• Exclusive Territory: The board is divided into colored sections. You must place exactly one cat in each section.
• The Aloof Rule: Cats need absolute personal space! They absolutely cannot share the same row, column, or touch each other—not even diagonally.
• Risk & Reward: Double-tap a tile to place a cat. You only have 3 chances to make a mistake (hearts). Guess right, and you're rewarded with pure puzzle-solving satisfaction; guess wrong, and you lose a heart. Guessing won't save you; every single move must be carefully calculated!
✨ Key Features
🐾 Pure & Immersive Experience
- Non-Intrusive Ads: Zero interruptions to your gameplay, letting you fully enjoy a completely focused, Zen-like flow state.
- Play Offline Anytime: No internet required. Perfectly fills up the puzzle-shaped hole in your daily commute, time spent waiting in line, or your morning coffee break.
- Privacy Focused: We never track your data. We only care that you enjoy the game safely and securely.
📅 Daily Brain Teasers
- Wake up your mind with brand-new "Daily Puzzles" every single day.
- Push your limits and see if you can break your fastest completion times on the global leaderboards.
❤️ Why Meowdoku Will Stay on Your Phone
Meowdoku won't hijack your attention with tedious social mechanics or endless daily grinds—it earns your love through pure gameplay quality. With its minimalist aesthetic and satisfying tactile feedback, it takes just seconds to learn. Yet, long after you put your phone down, its elegant logic loop will keep lingering in your mind.
Ready for a brain-teasing puzzle adventure filled with adorable felines?
Download Meowdoku now, put your logic to the test, and become the ultimate feline puzzle master!

apps.title: NTE: Neverness to Everness
apps.summary:
NTE is a supernatural open-world RPG developed by Hotta Studio. The story begins in the city of Hethereau, where you play as its first "unlicensed" Anomaly Hunter. You'll join the crew at Eibon, a rundown antique shop that keeps the lights on by taking Anomaly commissions from anyone willing to pay. Alongside a diverse cast of extraordinary companions, you'll unravel urban mysteries, ride out adventures full of laughs and heartbreak, and write your own stories in the neon-lit streets.

◆ Strange City, Strange Adventures

Welcome to the first stop in your appraisal career—Hethereau, a sprawling and vibrant metropolis!

In the crowded halls of the Bureau of Anomaly Control, hopeful Oddities queue up for resident permits, while over at the train station, an Esper commuter snaps his fingers to clean his work suit on the fly. Down one block, a chaotic chase after Danzaburou is spiraling out of control; while across the street, a vacationing silver-gloved Butler is shooting the breeze with the owner of a second-hand electronics shop. Everywhere you look, there's no shortage of intriguingly "abnormal" scenes.

Want to dive deeper into a world where humans and the supernatural coexist? Start your journey in Hethereau to see it for yourself. The lively and quirky daily life here is a grand adventure in itself.

◆ Interesting Stories, Lighthearted Connections

Today's Top Story: Rumors are swirling about a mysterious pawnshop that only appears on the night of the full moon. What would you trade for a wish?

Breaking News: Taygedo's romance crisis! Romance and impulse, heartbreak and missed chances—Miss Tako, the object of a secret crush, is about to leave Hethereau with her guarantor. How will the lovestruck otter get his feelings across before it's too late?

Reliable Insider Tip: Film Orbit Studio is back in business! Members of the Eibon Antique Shop get exclusive discounts!

Weather Update: The Anomaly Rainman is entering an active phase—don't forget your rain gear on the way out!

That wraps up today's 10AM broadcast. Stay tuned for mysterious Anomalies, unbreakable "Oaths," and the ever-growing shadow of the colossal "Circle" organization, looming larger in the fragmented echoes of "Prophecies"...

◆ Encounters and Bonds

Explore hidden shops tucked away in back alleys and meet their enigmatic owners, along with absurdly overpowered bodyguards, "jack-of-all-trades" robotic butlers, troublemakers who can't help finding problems, and TV-headed repairmen with some very curious eating habits.

As part of the Eibon crew, you'll never be short on energetic companions for the road ahead.

Expand your social circle starting from the bustling Hankaku Street! Meet members from different factions and add them as "Bagel" friends!

From the tight-knit neighborhood of street shops to the city's unique hunter organizations, countless side stories await—ready for you to make friends and forge bonds across every corner of Hethereau.

◆ Customize Your Urban Lifestyle

Explore the city on your own terms—stick to familiar routines or shake things up.

Customize your ride and tear through the city streets, or hop on the Ghost Train to cut through Anomaly space and arrive in a flash.

In your downtime, swing by the old shops on Hankaku Street to browse their secret seasonal stock, or buy a cozy little home and deck it out to your liking.

Go at your own pace, follow your instincts, and let Hethereau reward you with colorful days worth remembering.
Follow our official channels for the latest on NTE!
